Production validation confirmed 184333 exact retained bytes, production normalization, the eight-object graph, SCN-010-026, and SCN-010-029. executionHistory.summary: Appended only the UX-owned UI Wireframes and User Flows sections to spec.md while preserving the analyst-owned specification. Defined one persistent company/evidence shell, a default Simple cockpit, six Detailed research workspaces, scoped degradation and blocking states, 21 reusable UI primitives, exact evidence classes and clock/status language, responsive mobile contracts, keyboard and WCAG behavior, and nine user journeys with explicit coverage for BS-010-001 through BS-010-032. Focused UX1-UX5 and UX8-UX9 checks, scenario coverage, state-boundary assertions, diff checks, and artifact freshness passed. G094 accepted the Domain Capability Model and UI Primitives but remained nonzero only because bubbles.design has not authored design.md. Canonical artifact lint remained nonzero only for foreign-owned design.md, scopes.md, report.md, and uservalidation.md. No sidecar, technical design, planning artifact, report, user-validation artifact, source code, test, status, completed-phase claim, policy snapshot, or certification field was written; next owner is bubbles.design.

Created the substantive contract-grade design.md from the current analyst and UX handoff without editing spec.md. Defined the build-free controlled SEC and issuer-evidence ingestion boundary, content-addressed static publications, exact static response and domain schemas, reusable company dossier/fact/model/brief contracts, ordinary-company and financial-institution model families, MSFT/CMG/JPM archetype overlays, restatement/conflict/integrity rules, adaptive evidence-to-model proposals with explicit user acceptance, one accepted Simple/Detailed/export state, Feature 002 committed owner-read integration, MSFT specialist-page compatibility, accessibility/responsive behavior, rights/privacy controls, scoped degradation, observability receipts, complete FR/NFR traceability, and 32 technical Gherkin scenarios. Focused design validation passed with 23 required sections, exact 32/32 business-to-technical scenario parity, four named concrete implementations, eight variation axes, and no placeholders. The exact repository selftest passed 497 checks with zero failures; artifact freshness passed with zero findings; editor diagnostics were clean; and framework-write-guard confirmed managed-file integrity while warning that the installed local-source snapshot is dirty. G094 accepted the domain, design, UI, implementation, and variation contracts and remained nonzero only because bubbles.plan has not authored a foundation scope. Canonical artifact lint accepted spec.md, design.md, state.json, sidecar absence, and status/certification coherence, and remained nonzero only for plan-owned scopes.md, report.md, and uservalidation.md. No source code, test, planning artifact, certification field, policy snapshot, terminal status, or completed-phase claim was changed. Routed next to bubbles.plan.

Created the execution-ready 14-scope per-directory plan without implementation or delivery evidence. Ordered reusable contract/config/validator/publication, controlled source ingestion, reconciliation/integrity, derived metrics/diagnostics, and archetype/KPI/peer foundations before the MSFT/CMG/JPM overlays; then planned linked model families, accepted browser state and explicit proposal decisions, the accessible one-state Simple/Detailed workspace, adaptive brief classifications, degraded/unchanged history, accepted export and Feature 002 owner-read integration, and final controlled live canary acquisition/hardening. Added 14 adjacent report templates, uservalidation.md, scenario-manifest.json with exact primary ownership and stable hashes for all 32 business scenarios, and test-plan.json with 81 Markdown-synchronized test rows. Mapped FR-010-001 through FR-010-104 and NFR-010-001 through NFR-010-022 to primary scopes, tests, and DoD; captured SEC_USER_AGENT as a required non-secret fail-loud process input; isolated high-fan-out registry, selftest, navigation, and brief-refresh changes behind independent canaries and rollback boundaries; and kept international/IFRS, commercial-provider activation, personalized advice/trading, and automatic proposal application outside active delivery. Top-level status, certification, policySnapshot, analyst/UX/design content, and completed-phase claims remain unchanged. Next required owner is bubbles.implement.

mode: replace (Increment A re-decomposition). Corrected the overstated 'Reused Implementation Inventory' framing to an honest foundation-skeleton-vs-net-new inventory and re-decomposed Increment A from two scopes into four vertical one-pass executable slices, producing a single-file seven-scope plan across three increments: Increment A (Scope 1 facts/periods/reconciliation/integrity; Scope 2 derived metrics/diagnostics/capital-allocation/archetype/Simple cockpit; Scope 3 linked model/accepted state; Scope 4 Detailed workspaces/peers/export/tool-read/registry), Increment B (Scope 5 adaptive brief + Feature 002 consume-once), and Increment C (Scope 6 CMG/JPM overlays; Scope 7 real canary/accessibility/hardening). Each Increment-A slice owns its config additions, data fixtures, helpers, minimal UI wiring, and the validator plus selftest expectation updates so the selftest, the validator, and the fingerprint-bound MSFT publication stay green at each slice boundary. All thirty-two SCN-010 scenarios remain mapped to exactly one active slice with no drop or invalidation. Kept single-file layout deliberately: switching to per-scope directories would pull the retired plan's fourteen scopes/NN/report.md evidence directories (including the preserved foreign Scope 01 evidence) into the active report set and break scope/report parity, so single-file is the layout that passes the framework while preserving that evidence. Reconciled a concurrent-writer revert that had rolled state.json back to a 2026-07-17T02:13 per-scope-directory snapshot: restored scopeLayout=single-file, artifacts.scopes/report to the single-file paths, and execution.scopeProgress to the seven single-file scopes, preserving all foreign transitionRequests, executionHistory, failures, activeBugs, resolvedBugs, certification, and policySnapshot. artifact-lint, artifact-freshness-guard, and traceability-guard pass. Did not modify product source/tests/config/data, retained evidence, certification.*, .github/bubbles/**, or foreign report evidence. Next required owner is bubbles.implement for Scope 1.

Advanced top-level status and certification.status from not_started to in_progress because implementation has genuinely begun; certification completedScopes and certifiedCompletedPhases remain empty, so no completion is certified here. Did not modify certification completion fields, policySnapshot, foreign transitionRequests, prior executionHistory, failures, activeBugs, resolvedBugs, any product/test/config/data byte, or any artifact outside specs/010-company-fundamentals-and-brief-lab. The state-transition-guard remains a whole-feature done-gate that targets the done ceiling and correctly reports the feature is not yet done because Scopes 2 through 7 are unimplemented; artifact-lint, traceability-guard, and artifact-freshness-guard pass.
